title: [MTR4] Minecraft Original Rail Texture Pack
description: this pack added minecraft original rail to minecraft mtr mod
body:
# Description
The resource pack added the original Minecraft rail and the Minecraft powered rail to the Minecraft transit railway. This resource pack uses the original Minecraft texture. This pack requires the MTR mod. You can use this pack for Minecraft Transport Railways mod's minecart.

## How this pack works

1. take a brush![take a brush](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/25dc142dae7b02dc6689c5bbd4fa22c48d0ba422.png)

2. Use a brush to right-click the rail node. ![right click](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c674617484051083aacad293576fafe8aa09a181.png)

3. Click edit. 

4. Search "mcograil" or "mcogpowerrail" and click +. ![Choose mcograil or mcogpowerrail.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d9cdc3bc7eece8e829083136aaf425708cc1187c_0.webp)

## How to report an issue

You can report an issue in [here](https://github.com/JackLR7392/MinecraftOgRailPackFormtrmod/issues)
